name: Wild Rice Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Move oven rack to the lowest position. Heat the oven to 350 degrees.
2. Generously grease and flour a 12-cup bundt cake pan or tube pan, 10 x 4 inches.
3. Beat all ingredients except wild rice and nuts in a large bowl on low speed for 30 seconds, scraping the bowl constantly.
4. Beat on high speed for 3 minutes, scraping the bowl occasionally.
5. Stir in the wild rice and nuts.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 55 to 60 minutes until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Cool for 20 minutes, then remove from the pan.
9. Allow it to cool completely before serving with Maple Whipped Cream (follows).
